task: Write a Python function called cents_to_dollars(cents: int) -> float that divides cents by 100 and rounds to 2 decimal places. Test: if __name__ == "__main__": assert cents_to_dollars(4783250) == 47832.50; print("TEST PASSED")

Write a Python function called dollars_to_cents(amount: float) -> int that converts a dollar amount to integer cents using round(). Test: if __name__ == "__main__": assert dollars_to_cents(47832.50) == 4783250; print("TEST PASSED")

Write a Python function called format_iban(iban: str) -> str that removes all spaces from the input and converts to uppercase. Test: if __name__ == "__main__": assert format_iban("gb29 nwbk 6016") == "GB29NWBK6016"; print("TEST PASSED")

Write a Python function called get_iban_country(iban: str) -> str that returns the first 2 characters of an IBAN string in uppercase, or raises ValueError if the string is shorter than 2 characters. Test: if __name__ == "__main__": assert get_iban_country("DE89370400440532013000") == "DE"; assert get_iban_country("GB29NWBK") == "GB"; print("TEST PASSED")

Write a Python function called is_sepa_country(country_code: str) -> bool that returns True if the country code is in this set: GB, DE, FR, ES, IT, NL, BE, AT, PT, IE, FI, SE, DK, NO, PL, CZ, HU, RO, SK, SI, EE, LV, LT, LU, MT, CY, GR, HR, BG. Test: if __name__ == "__main__": assert is_sepa_country("DE") == True; assert is_sepa_country("US") == False; print("TEST PASSED")
List every module inside fastapi/ that imports from starlette and report which starlette names each one imports.
Write a new APIRoute subclass that follows the constructor signature and attribute conventions used in fastapi/routing.py APIRoute, adding a single new attribute called custom_tag.
Find a code pattern that is repeated across at least three files in fastapi/ and write a verified Python skill that abstracts it. Cite the three source files.
